user_scenarios.user_goal: As an ai_infra wiki maintainer, verify that the formal compute accelerator crawl produced a durable manifest with at least one successful raw evidence capture.
prerequisites: The formal crawl has run under harness rules.
The personal-wiki ai_infra raw crawler evidence area exists.
steps: Confirm the manifest parses and reports at least one successful source.
Confirm each successful source has raw evidence under personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/raw/crawler/.
expected_outcomes: Every succeeded manifest entry includes an existing raw crawler path.
Failed and skipped-disabled manifest entries include diagnostic source IDs and reason or error fields.
failure_signals: The manifest is missing or invalid JSON.
The succeeded count is below the required threshold.
A succeeded source has no raw path or references a missing file.
A failed or skipped-disabled entry lacks source_id, error, or reason details.
cleanup: Remove .codex/accelerator-crawl/compute-accelerator-formal-crawl-01/ if a clean rerun is needed.
